SmoothPLS 0.1.2

    • synthetic_data_00
    • comparaison_one_state_02

  • Changelog

    generate_X_df_SFD_data

    generate_X_df_SFD_data.Rd

    This function generate test data of nind X which are noised cosinuses.

    generate_X_df_SFD_data(
  nind = 100,
  start = 0,
  end = 100,
  noise_sd = 0.1,
  seed = 123
)

    Arguments

    nind

    number of individuals, default 500

    start

    first time, default 0

    end

    last time, default 100

    noise_sd

    noise added to the signal, default 0.1

    seed

    seed for reproductability, default 123

    Value

    a dataframe

    Author

    Francois Bassac

    Examples

    generate_X_df_SFD(nind = 100, start = 0, end = 100,
noise_sd = 0.1, seed = 123)
#>        id time         value
